title: Build and Explore
description: Vanilla friendly minecraft modpack for Builders, Technicians  and Explorers
body:
![title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4aa919ac61d3d56b24deb64d838e3d139316ea86.png)
A modpack to bring exploration and building to the next level, but at the same time not lose the vanilla character
# Features - ⚡ Massive performance boost powered by Sodium and various other FPS-boosting mods - 🌳 Beautiful new world generation through a combination of Tectonic, Regions unexplored and geophilic - 🪁 Stunning ambience through new shaders, textures, sounds and ofc Distance Horizons - 🐉 Nether update through incendium,combined with an overhauled dragon fight - 🦋 New wildlife including friendly animals and hostile predators - 🌽 More crops to grow and expand your farm - 🪑 More possibilities with new building and decoration blocks - ⚙️ industrialization trough the Create mod with some aditions - 🔧 Improved gameplay with several QoL additions - 💎 Easy multiplayer with the help of the Essential Mod pls report any buggs or make sugestions on my [Discord](https://discord.gg/5mtV6QPNtq)
